name: Pulkovo 1942(83)
area: Onshore Bulgaria, Czechia, Germany (former DDR), Hungary and Slovakia.
remarks: Replaces 1956 adjustment (CRS code 4179). In Brandenburg replaced by ETRS89. In Sachsen and Thuringen replaced by RD83 and PD/83 which for practical purposes may be considered to be the same as DHDN.
